competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Anthropic Claude new feature announcement July 15 2026 (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: Tier1持续403，转WebSearch+直连Claude Code CHANGELOG核实。CHANGELOG版本从baseline记录的v2.1.209前进至v2.1.210：新增screen reader权限变更播报、Agent view标注按←返回的session、agents footer显示等待中的background agent数量、hardened Agent tool against indirect prompt injection等，均为CLI层面UI/安全加固小改动。WebSearch另发现两项baseline未记录内容：(1) Claude新增Microsoft 365写入工具（草拟发送邮件、管理日历、创建更新OneDrive/SharePoint文件）；(2) Team/Enterprise管理员新增Trusted Devices功能，要求远程查看/操控本地Claude Code session前先验证设备。
competitors.content_hash: Tier1持续403，转WebSearch+直连Claude Code CHANGELOG核实。CHANGELOG版本从baseline记录的v2.1.209前进至v

changes.description: Claude Code CHANGELOG新增v2.1.210，含Agent tool抗间接prompt injection加固、session/background agent相关UI改进
changes.evidence: 「Hardened Agent tool against indirect prompt injection」「Agent view marks session you pressed ← from」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：均为Claude Code自身CLI层面的UI/安全加固，涉及session/background agent关键词但属于既有功能的稳定性维护，非新的跨session/跨工具协同能力，与meee2锚点无结构性重叠

changes.description: Claude新增Microsoft 365写入工具，可在Word/Outlook/日历/OneDrive/SharePoint中起草并发送邮件、创建更新文件
changes.evidence: 「adds Microsoft 365 write tools, letting users draft and send email, manage calendar events, and create or update OneDrive and SharePoint files」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：这是对外部办公工具的一次性写入能力，未见描述为双向live link或跨session的artifact同步，与meee2锚点2（跨工具artifact live link，非snapshot）表面接近但证据不足以确认为live link，暂不判定为威胁信号

changes.description: Team/Enterprise管理员新增Trusted Devices功能，远程查看/操控本地Claude Code session前需验证设备
changes.evidence: 「Admins for Team and Enterprise plans can now require members to verify their device before viewing or steering local Claude Code sessions remotely」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：这是Anthropic自有Remote Control功能（本身与meee2锚点5'菜单栏/远程戳session'已有结构性重叠）的安全加固层，非新能力扩展，暂不视为新增威胁

key_findings: Claude Code CHANGELOG新增v2.1.210，多为CLI稳定性/安全加固修复
新发现M365写入工具与Trusted Devices远程session验证功能，均未见于baseline

competitors.name: Product Hunt AI 新品雷达
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Product Hunt AI new launches July 15 2026 (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: PH官方feed持续403，转WebSearch。本轮新品：ChatCut（AI视频编辑）、Ship OS by Notion（产品开发全流程）、Mispher（Mac端听写+agent执行）、Yasmine Works（Slack内AI coworker）、N71（多agent共享context）、Stigg 2.0、Velo 3.0、Sim（开源AI agent与workflow工作空间）、PlugThis、Scarlett（Slack/iMessage AI coworker）。经watch_keywords核验，Framer新增'Agents on the canvas'（在canvas上设计/写作/分析/组织站点，并可将Claude Code或Codex等外部AI接入Framer）命中canvas+agent 2项；Sim命中workspace+agent 2项，均达到≥2关键词阈值，记为观察候选。
competitors.content_hash: PH官方feed持续403，转WebSearch。本轮新品：ChatCut（AI视频编辑）、Ship OS by Notion（产品开发全流程）、Mis

changes.description: Framer新增'Agents on the canvas'功能，可在canvas上设计/写作/分析/组织站点，并支持接入Claude Code、Codex等外部AI
changes.evidence: 「Framer introduced Agents on the canvas to design, write, analyze, and organize your site, including ways to connect your own AI's like Claude Code or Codex to Framer」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：canvas上的agent协同设计、且明确支持接入外部AI工具（Claude Code/Codex），在'descriptive canvas'与'跨工具接入'两个维度与meee2锚点3、4有形态呼应，值得下次纳入sources.json持续追踪

changes.evidence: 「Sim (an open-source workspace for AI agents and workflows)」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'workspace for AI agents and workflows'在workspace+agent层面与meee2定位重叠，但描述过于笼统，缺乏session同构或live link等具体证据，建议下次追踪核实细节

key_findings: 本轮新出现两个达到watch_keywords阈值的候选：Framer（Agents on canvas，接入Claude Code/Codex）、Sim（开源agent workspace）
建议下次报告将Framer与Sim纳入sources.json持续追踪

competitors.name: GitHub Claude Code 生态雷达
competitors.raw_snapshot: 数据质量提示：topic:claude-code查询星标数（20万+，如affaan-m/ECC 230007、NousResearch/hermes-agent 215304）持续异常，继续不采信、不作威胁升级依据。四查询按full_name去重合并（54个唯一仓库），按活跃度（pushed_at近30天或created_at近60天）过滤后，排除baseline（7/14）raw_snapshot已提及的仓库。本轮首次出现且满足活跃度条件的新仓库两个达到≥2 watch_keywords阈值：(1) thedotmack/claude-mem（'Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent – Captures everything your agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context back into future sessions'，命中session+agent 2项，created 2025-08-31/pushed 2026-07-15）；(2) luojiahai/code-by-wire（'Pilot every Claude Code session and monitor its telemetry, from one cockpit'，命中session+cockpit 2项，47 star，created 2026-06-08/pushed 2026-07-15）。另有alliecatowo/glassy（GPU加速终端模拟器，仅命中terminal 1项，未达阈值）为新仓库但不计入changes。两者均属baseline已多次记录的'跨session统一管理/cockpit'范式家族，非结构性新范式。本次items全量full_name列表（供下次去重，54个）：affaan-m/ECC, NousResearch/hermes-agent, farion1231/cc-switch, nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill, JuliusBrussee/caveman, Graphify-Labs/graphify, thedotmack/claude-mem, DietrichGebert/ponytail, addyosmani/agent-skills, Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything, rtk-ai/rtk, shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code, ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills, gsd-build/get-shit-done, ruvnet/ruflo, Leonxlnx/taste-skill, shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice, santifer/career-ops, iAmCorey/kooky, bitcoin21ideas/claude-statusline, lldong/tiny-trae, Postmodum37/simple-claude-code-statusline, shehab267/ccbrief, ferreirafabio/tailgrid, JoaoHenriqueBarbosa/agent-42, atxtechbro/test-ink-flickering, foolish-dev/teleia, Abhishek-Chougule/claude-cli-statusline, GaoSSR/best-claude-hud, meeghele/mini-ccstatus, alliecatowo/glassy, suyash-thakur/clawnote, startupfundraising/claude-code-chat-bridge, Naberator/vs, jkrocil/claude-code-launcher, slpuh/claude-statusline, alchaincyf/fanbox, handmux/handmux, luojiahai/code-by-wire, Surething-io/cockpit, dotdevdotdev/agentwire-dev, alexjbarnes/cockpit, arikechen/ATF, trevormil/TerMinal, nashory/agent-cockpit, jiliangarette/claude-code-pane, WillBe89/gitsidian, Rurutia-Artemis/rurutia, myounghalee/cockpit, arcnid/peemux, kunal-7x/claude-cockpit, juicerq/bankai, lxyer/multi-agent-collaboration-system, C4RL05/agent-race-control
competitors.content_hash: 数据质量提示：topic:claude-code查询星标数（20万+，如affaan-m/ECC 230007、NousResearch/hermes-agent 21

changes.description: thedotmack/claude-mem——为每个agent捕获session内所有行为、AI压缩后注入未来session，实现跨session持久化context
changes.evidence: 「Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent – Captures everything your agent does during sessions...injects relevant context back into future sessions」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'跨session持久化context并注入未来session'与meee2锚点4（跨session/跨工具/跨owner的artifact pull）在'跨session记忆延续'层面有形态呼应，但仅为单agent的记忆压缩注入机制，无跨工具/跨owner的pull协议或live link设计，结构重叠有限

changes.description: luojiahai/code-by-wire——从单一cockpit统一驾驶并监控所有Claude Code session的遥测
changes.evidence: 「Pilot every Claude Code session and monitor its telemetry, from one cockpit.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'从一个cockpit统一驾驶所有session'触及session统一管理概念，但属于baseline已多次记录的cockpit范式家族（与Surething-io/cockpit、C4RL05/agent-race-control等同类），非新范式，47 star规模较小

key_findings: 重要数据质量提示：topic:claude-code查询星标数（20万+级别）持续异常，继续不采信
本轮两个新entrant（thedotmack/claude-mem、luojiahai/code-by-wire）分别延续'跨session记忆'与'cockpit统一管理'两个已知范式家族，非新范式
alliecatowo/glassy为新出现的终端模拟器，仅命中1项watch_keywords，未达阈值不计入changes
